name: skillspec
description: SkillSpec is a CLI plus a structured skill plan for making agent skills easier to follow, test, route, and prove.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect, import, route, run, and prove SkillSpec-backed skills.
interface.longDescription: SkillSpec keeps agent skills small at the surface while moving critical behavior into a structured contract. The plugin exposes the SkillSpec guide so agents can run doctor, import skills, follow run-loop guidance, record proof, and print alignment summaries from chat.
defaultPrompt: Run doctor on this skill repo
Import this SKILL.md into SkillSpec and prove it
